scripts.verify: bun run verify:services && bun run verify:web && bun run verify:operator
scripts.verify:services: bun run --cwd services/backend typecheck && bun run --cwd services/backend test && bun run --cwd services/keeper typecheck && bun run --cwd services/keeper test && bun run --cwd services/operator typecheck
scripts.verify:web: bun run --cwd web typecheck && bun run --cwd web test -- --passWithNoTests
